banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock licence holder: Jordan Lee, renewing a full class C driver licence online for a 5-year term, eligible on every online-renewal gate (within the eligible age range, licence not expired more than 6 months, no learner class involved, no licence restrictions, no overdue medical assessment, signature/photo current within 10.5 years, no interlock or Q condition, meets eyesight requirements, no combined driver/boat licence, not requesting a 10-year term, no Passenger Transport T012 code, no address change in the last 14 days, not requesting a Photo Card at the same time, last renewal not done via photo-kit, no older-driver assessment needed). All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real licence holder's information.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible for standard online renewal of a full class C licence for a 5-year term: within the eligible age range, licence not expired more than 6 months, no learner class involved, no licence restrictions, no overdue medical assessment, signature/photo current within 10.5 years, no interlock or Q condition, meets eyesight requirements, no combined driver/boat licence, no 10-year term requested, no PT T012 code, no recent address change, no simultaneous Photo Card request, last renewal not via photo-kit, and no older-driver assessment needed.

reasons.requirement: Must be aged 17 or over (or under 70 if licence class is MC)
reasons.sourceRef: Eligibility — "you're aged 17 years or over (up to 70 if your licence class is MC)"

reasons.requirement: Licence must not be expired more than 6 months
reasons.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'you hold an eligible driver licence that will expire in 6 months or less, or expired no more than 6 months ago'

reasons.requirement: Must not hold a learner licence or a dual-class licence including a learner class
reasons.sourceRef: Reasons you may not be able to renew or upgrade online — 'you hold a learner driver or rider licence'

reasons.requirement: Licence must not have enforcement-related restrictions
reasons.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'your licence is not subject to any restrictions related to enforcement'

reasons.requirement: Must have no overdue NSW Fitness to Drive medical assessment
reasons.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'your NSW Fitness to Drive medical assessment is not overdue'

reasons.requirement: Signature and photo must have been taken within 10.5 years before the new licence expires
reasons.sourceRef: Eligibility — "you've had your signature and photograph taken by TfNSW within 10.5 years before the new licence expires"

reasons.requirement: Must not have an interlock or Q condition
reasons.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'your licence has an interlock or Q (temporary overseas visitor) condition.'

reasons.requirement: Must meet the applicable eyesight requirements
Must not hold a combined driver/boat licence
reasons.sourceRef: Reasons you may not be able to renew or upgrade online — 'you hold a combined driver licence and boat licence'

reasons.requirement: Must not be requesting a 10-year term (in-person only)
reasons.sourceRef: Introduction — "You'll need to visit a Service NSW Centre in person if you'd like a 10-year licence"

reasons.requirement: Must not hold Passenger Transport licence code PT T012
reasons.sourceRef: Reasons you may not be able to renew or upgrade online — 'you hold a Passenger Transport licence code PT T012'

reasons.requirement: Must not have changed address within the last 14 days
reasons.sourceRef: Reasons you may not be able to renew or upgrade online — "you've changed your address within the last 14 days"

reasons.requirement: Must not be applying for a NSW Photo Card at the same time
reasons.sourceRef: Reasons you may not be able to renew or upgrade online — "you'd like to apply for a NSW Photo Card at the same time"

reasons.requirement: Last renewal must not have been done using a photo-kit
reasons.sourceRef: Reasons you may not be able to renew or upgrade online — 'your last renewal was done using a photo-kit'

reasons.requirement: Must not need an older driver assessment
reasons.sourceRef: Reasons you may not be able to renew or upgrade online — 'you need to complete an older driver assessment'

collectedValues.label: Are you under 17 years old, or (if your licence class is MC) 70 years of age or older?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — "you're aged 17 years or over (up to 70 if your licence class is MC)"

collectedValues.label: Did your licence expire more than 6 months ago?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'you hold an eligible driver licence that will expire in 6 months or less, or expired no more than 6 months ago'

collectedValues.label: Do you hold a learner driver or rider licence, or a dual-class licence that includes a learner class?

collectedValues.label: Does your licence have any restrictions — for example, cancelled, disqualified, suspended, refused, pending an appeal or suspension decision, a restricted-journey condition, or an outstanding fine payment?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'your licence is not subject to any restrictions related to enforcement'

collectedValues.label: Does your licence have an interlock condition, or a Q (temporary overseas visitor) condition?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'your licence has an interlock or Q (temporary overseas visitor) condition.'

collectedValues.label: Have you changed your address within the last 14 days?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Reasons you may not be able to renew or upgrade online — "you've changed your address within the last 14 days"

collectedValues.label: Would you like to apply for a NSW Photo Card at the same time as this renewal?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Reasons you may not be able to renew or upgrade online — "you'd like to apply for a NSW Photo Card at the same time"

collectedValues.label: Was your last renewal done using a photo-kit?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Reasons you may not be able to renew or upgrade online — 'your last renewal was done using a photo-kit'

collectedValues.label: Do you need to complete an older driver assessment?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Reasons you may not be able to renew or upgrade online — 'you need to complete an older driver assessment'

collectedValues.label: Licence class being renewed
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'single class full licence (C, R, LR, MR, HR, HC, MC)'

collectedValues.label: Current licence expiry date
collectedValues.sourceRef: Eligibility — 'you hold an eligible driver licence that will expire in 6 months or less, or expired no more than 6 months ago'

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (au/nsw/service-nsw/driver-licence-renewal). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to Transport for NSW, Service NSW, or any government system. A human (the licence holder) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize renewal through Service NSW's own channel (online at service.nsw.gov.au via a MyServiceNSW Account, or in person at a Service NSW Centre) before this renewal is submitted. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
